findings.label: downloading.card.meta
findings.detail: expected: PRD-P8 D5 — see not-installed.card.meta. — “Qwen 3 4B · 5.6 GB · free forever” → “Qwen 3 4B · 4.3 GB · free forever”

findings.label: downloading.dep
findings.detail: “Ollama detected — downloading nowQwen 3 4B · 2.4 / 5.6 GB · …” → “Ollama detected — downloading nowQwen 3 4B · 2.4 / 4.3 GB · …”

findings.label: downloading.dep
findings.detail: expected: HARNESS ARTIFACT, no visual effect: the mock's base font-size is 13px and the live fixture inherits 13.6px (0.85rem). Every text node in this card sets its own size (title 13, meta 9.5, body 11.5, note 9, dling/ok 11.5, watch 10.5), so this is the inherited base only and renders nothing. — 13px → 13.6px (+0.6px)

findings.label: downloading.spin
findings.detail: expected: visually identical: 50% and 999px both render a circle on a square element. — 50% → 999px

findings.label: downloading.prog
findings.detail: expected: HARNESS ARTIFACT, no visual effect: the mock's base font-size is 13px and the live fixture inherits 13.6px (0.85rem). Every text node in this card sets its own size (title 13, meta 9.5, body 11.5, note 9, dling/ok 11.5, watch 10.5), so this is the inherited base only and renders nothing. — 13px → 13.6px (+0.6px)

findings.label: downloading.prog.fill
findings.detail: expected: HARNESS ARTIFACT, no visual effect: the mock's base font-size is 13px and the live fixture inherits 13.6px (0.85rem). Every text node in this card sets its own size (title 13, meta 9.5, body 11.5, note 9, dling/ok 11.5, watch 10.5), so this is the inherited base only and renders nothing. — 13px → 13.6px (+0.6px)

findings.label: downloading.prog.fill
findings.detail: expected: fixture arithmetic, not a style delta. The mock hard-codes width:42% (42% of a 5.6 GB total that does not exist); the live fixture sets the honest completed/total = 2.4 / 4.3 GB = 56%. The fill's SKIN (height, radius, background, transition) is scored normally. — 113.391px → 157.359px

findings.label: downloading.note
findings.detail: expected: TWO declared deltas in one line. (a) PRD-P8 D5 — "2.4 / 5.6 GB" → "2.4 / 4.3 GB", the verified Q8_0 total. (b) PRD-P8 D4a-2 — the tail reads "downloading in the background", not the mock's "type your first prompt while it lands": D4 keeps the user ON the gate while an auto-started pull runs, and there is no composer there, so the mock's line would be a lie. The mock's wording IS used verbatim once the user has advanced (composer/ack). — “Qwen 3 4B · 2.4 / 5.6 GB · type your first prompt while it l…” → “Qwen 3 4B · 2.4 / 4.3 GB · downloading in the background”

findings.label: downloading.acts
findings.detail: expected: PRD-P8 D4a-1 — the mock's ③ foot has no action row because the mock has already auto-advanced the user to the composer (~1.4s after detection). D4 deliberately does not steal the stage, so the card stays mounted and the user needs a way forward.

findings.label: downloading.action
findings.detail: expected: PRD-P8 D4a-1 — the "Continue →" button. It is the MINIMUM affordance that makes D4 navigable (advance without restarting the in-flight pull); the mock has no analog. Hosts wire it through the Gate slot's `ctx.onContinue`, and the card renders no button when it is omitted. NOTE: the live fixture passes `onContinue` itself, so this report measures the CORRECTLY-WIRED card — an unwired host is a host-test concern (FirstRunGate / FirstRunSurfaceMount), never something a parity report can catch.
